scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c magenta,green,blue "npm run watch -w shared" "npm run start:dev -w backend" "npm run dev:frontend:wait"
scripts.dev:frontend:wait: node scripts/wait-for-backend.mjs && npm run dev -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w shared && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.lint:ci: npm run lint -w shared && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint:ci -w backend
